name: field-responsive
visual_summary: The field-responsive component is a flexible form field that adapts to different screen sizes and devices. It provides a clean and minimalistic input area with optional labels and placeholder text. This component is ideal for use in forms, registration, and subscription processes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: field-responsive
Description: The field-responsive component is a flexible form field that adapts to different screen sizes and devices. It provides a clean and minimalistic input area with optional labels and placeholder text. This component is ideal for use in forms, registration, and subscription processes.
Style: minimal
Interactions: 
Tags: form, input, responsive, registration, subscription

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
